scripts.clean:cache: npm run clean --prefix frontend && npm run clean --prefix backend && node -e "const {rmSync}=require('fs');const {join}=require('path');const r=join(__dirname);for (const p of ['frontend/node_modules/.cache','backend/node_modules/.cache','node_modules/.cache']) { try { rmSync(join(r,p),{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch(e) {} } try { rmSync(join(r,'frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'),{force:true}); } catch(e) {}"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
